title: strategy_005_ichimoku_cloud_cci_momentum
author: manual-transcript-drop
summary_bullets: STRATEGY: Ichimoku Cloud Trend + CCI Momentum Entry ASSET: BTC, ETH TIMEFRAME: 4h MARKET CONDITION: Trending with momentum confirmation TYPE: Trend following with momentum timing CONCEPT: Ichimoku Cloud provides one of the most complete trend identification systems - it shows trend direction, strength, support/resistance, and momentum all in one indicator.
CCI adds precise entry timing by catching momentum shifts.
We enter when CCI shows momentum returning to the trend direction while Ichimoku confirms the trend is strong and price is on the right side of the cloud.

INDICATORS USED: - Ichimoku Cloud (conversion 9, base 26, span B 52, displacement 26) - Tenkan-sen (conversion line) - short-term momentum - Kijun-sen (base line) - medium-term trend - Senkou Span A and B (cloud) - trend direction and S/R - CCI (period 20) - momentum entry timing - ATR (period 14) - stop loss and position sizing ENTRY LONG: 1.
Price is above the Ichimoku Cloud (above both Span A and Span B) 2.
Tenkan-sen > Kijun-sen (short-term momentum aligned with trend) 3.
Cloud is green (Span A > Span B, bullish cloud) 4.
CCI(20) crosses above -100 from below (momentum returning after pullback) ENTRY SHORT: 1.
Cloud is red (Span A < Span B, bearish cloud) 4.

extracted_rules: We enter when CCI shows momentum returning to the trend direction while Ichimoku confirms the trend is strong and price is on the right side of the cloud.

INDICATORS USED: - Ichimoku Cloud (conversion 9, base 26, span B 52, displacement 26) - Tenkan-sen (conversion line) - short-term momentum - Kijun-sen (base line) - medium-term trend - Senkou Span A and B (cloud) - trend direction and S/R - CCI (period 20) - momentum entry timing - ATR (period 14) - stop loss and position sizing ENTRY LONG: 1.

CCI(20) crosses below +100 from above (momentum fading after bounce) EXIT RULES: - Primary exit: Price closes inside the cloud (trend weakening) - Secondary exit: Tenkan crosses Kijun opposite direction (momentum shift) - Stop loss: Opposite edge of cloud or 2.0x ATR, whichever is tighter - Take profit: 3.0x ATR from entry - Trailing stop: Once in 2.0 ATR profit, trail at Kijun-sen level RISK MANAGEMENT: - Risk per trade: 1% of account - Max concurrent positions: 1 per asset - Skip entry if clou

CCI adds precise entry timing by catching momentum shifts.
Entry: when CCI shows momentum returning to the trend direction while Ichimoku confirms the trend is strong and price is on the right side of the cloud.

INDICATORS USED: - Ichimoku Cloud (conversion 9, base 26, span B 52, displacement 26) - Tenkan-sen (conversion line) - short-term momentum - Kijun-sen (base line) - medium-term trend - Senkou Span A and B (cloud) - trend
Tenkan-sen > Kijun-sen (short-term momentum aligned with trend) 3.
CCI(20) crosses above -100 from below (momentum returning after pullback) ENTRY SHORT: 1.
CCI entry timing catches the moment momentum returns after a pullback within the trend - much better than entering on the initial breakout.
The cloud-based exit is dynamic and gets tighter as trend weakens.

explicit_conditions: Entry: when CCI shows momentum returning to the trend direction while Ichimoku confirms the trend is strong and price is on the right side of the cloud.
